snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk рЯІЯвАНвЩАпЄП

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards рЯСї

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвАЩs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвАФuntil he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвАЩs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia

snippet.description:
The madness is backвА¶ and this time, itвАЩs bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involvedвА¶ things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

The all-new OnePlus Nord 6 is now available starting at just вВє35,999! Click below and get yours:

https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0GRBBPBGQ?ie=UTF8&ref_=OnePlusNord6_newlaunch

Hey Guys, IвАЩm Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, IвАЩve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, IвАЩve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called вАШMatkaвАЩ, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages вАУ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal вАУ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime VideoвАЩs video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures вАУ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.description:
Immerse yourself in the emotional and romantic melody "Humsafar Ke Liye" from the 2003 film Jaal: The Trap. Sung by Alka Yagnik, this soulful track captures the pain and beauty of love, separation, and longing. The music by Anand Raj Anand and heartfelt lyrics make it a touching experience for every romantic heart.

hi.title: Alka Yagnik - Humsafar Ke Liye (Music Video) Sunny Deol, Reema Sen | Alka Yagnik | Jaal: The Trap
hi.description:
Immerse yourself in the emotional and romantic melody "Humsafar Ke Liye" from the 2003 film Jaal: The Trap. Sung by Alka Yagnik, this soulful track captures the pain and beauty of love, separation, and longing. The music by Anand Raj Anand and heartfelt lyrics make it a touching experience for every romantic heart.

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

snippet.title: BINDUSAGAR Official Trailer | In Cinemas April 17 | Presented by Anubhav Mohanty | Prakruti Mishra
snippet.description:
Superstar ANUBHAV MOHANTY proudly presents BINDUSAGAR,  one of the most anticipated Odia films. Releasing in cinemas across India on April 17th.

Starring: Prakruti Mishra, Dipanwit Dasmohapatra, Satya Ranjan, Sonalli Sharmisstha, Robin Das, Jagannath Seth, Sukant Rath, Pranab Prasanna Rath, Kishore Swain, Manoj Kumar Panda, Mamta Tripathi, Gaurab Mohanty

From the heart of Odisha rises Bindusagar вАФ Bringing powerful drama and deep emotions as a young womanвАЩs search for her roots collides with a grieving fatherвАЩs journey to faith. Set in the sacred city of Bhubaneswar and Puri, itвАЩs a gripping tale of love, loss, and redemptionвАФmade to hit the heart and connect with all generations.

A  #PlatoonOneFilms Production

snippet.description:
Watch the iconic Punjabi hit 8 Parche now in stunning 8K Ultra HD рЯФ•
Featuring the powerful voice of Baani Sandhu, this song brings unmatched attitude, swag & energy рЯТѓ Turn up the volume and enjoy this desi vibe anthem like never before рЯОІвЬ®

рЯТ• Why YouвАЩll Love It:
High-quality 8K visuals рЯУЇ
Full Punjabi swag & attitude рЯШО
Evergreen hit that still trends рЯФ•

Credits : 

Song : 8 Parche 
Singer : Baani Sandhu
Featuring : Gur Sidhu
Lyrics by : Jassi Lohka
Music &Composed by : Gur Sidhu
Mix & Master by : B Sanj
Presentation: Jassi Lohka
Starring: Gurneet Dosanjh
Video : Jassi Lohka Films
Director : Aarish & Sukh D
Project by : Preet Chahl & Arwinder Khosa
Design: Roop Kamal Singh
Edit & Di Colorist : Garry Khatrao Media
DOP : Mintoo
Production : Rahul
Makeup : Addy Makeover
Social Media Promotion : BTOWN Entertainment
Produced by: Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu
Online Promotion : Pixilar Studios


Lyrics :

Vadde vadde velly pa ke ghume jeba ch
Janda na dhayan meriyan panjeba ch
Vadde vadde velly pa ke ghume jeba ch
Janda na dhayan meriyan panjeba ch
Kihda kihda aithe das muh fad la
Hoge sharyam tere shehar charche
Bebe baapu puchde munde di degree ki dsa 8 chalde tere te parche
Tu yaaran piche firda pavonda chabiyan 26 saal di kuwari baithi tere kar ke
Samjhi na bholi mainu sab pta aa
Kithe kithe ho jande oh gayab ve
Aay mere piche jine ban romeo
Mud ke na mile chandigarh map te
Samjhi na bholi mainu sab pta aa
Kithe kithe ho jande oh gayab ve
Aay mere piche jine ban romeo
Mud ke na mile chandigarh map te
Ghumdi mohali teri thar vairiya kambe dil aa ji na kise na lad ke
Kambe dil aa ji na kise na lad ke
Mom dad puchde munde di degree ki dsa 8 chalde tere te parche
Tu yaaran piche firda pavonda chabiyan 26 saal di kawari baithi tere kar ke
A to z tere sare yaar jatt aa
Ho jatta vale dil jaata vali matt aa
Ho velly hoya munda jaila da shingar aa
Ha utto laggi pehli tere nal akh ni
Ho aida kida mera koi time chak ju
Ho on road lava ohdi gadi dakk ni
Ho aida kida mera koi time chak ju
Ho onroad lva ohdi gadi dakk ni
Painda pura robb pone 6 foot di
Ho turre jado jatt tere nal nal ni
Bhabi bhabi kehnde nahiyo yaar thakde hor tu rakane das ki bhaldi
Ho munde utte chaldia kai chabiyan jatt naam lava lu tenu 26 saal di
Munde utte chaldia kai chabiyan jatt nam lava lu tenu 26 saal di
Jatta jatti fan teri aise gal to tu yarran piche lene ni stand chad da
Hundi jiwe police punjab bharti tu load pai te yarran piche pej da
Behshak ladne to raaha rok di par koi kare tere ute vaar ve
Rakh du vichalo ohde hik paad ke ehne ko ta sine vich rakha khaar ve
Jassi lokha jassi lokha rahan jap di tere deed nu ah dil 24 7 tarse
Bebe baapu puchde munde di degree ki dsa 8 chalde tere te parche
Tu yaaran piche firda pavonda chabiyan 26 saal di kawari baithi tere kar ke

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul
Dubbing Director (Other Languages): RP Bala (RP Studios)

Presenting the promo of '#'Kamsahamnida'' from ''#KoreanKanakaraju'' starring Varun Tej,Ritika Nayak. Written & Directed by Merlapaka Gandhi . Music composed by Thaman S.

Mega Prince Varun TejвАЩs KOREAN KANAKARAJU is an upcoming INDO KOREAN HORROR COMEDY FILM, written and directed by Merlapaka Gandhi. Produced on an expansive scale by UV Creations and First Frame Entertainments with music by the sensational Thaman S. This project is set to deliver entertainment like never before. Joining the cast are the talented Satya and Ritika Nayak, promising a perfect blend of humour and drama.

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Braj Ras (Official Video) | Hari Ras Baithak | B Praak | Jaani | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record presents "Braj Ras" 

Hari Ras Baithak is a soulful Sankirtan experience where music becomes devotion and every note carries the divine name. In an intimate baithak setting, it invites you to pause, reflect, and immerse yourself in the bliss of bhakti.


Singer - B Praak
Composition - B Praak and Traditional 
Lyrics - Jaani and Traditonal 
Music - B Praak and Mir Desai 
Video - Prateek Thakur 

Spl Thanks - Yogi and Ananda for Shyam Sundar Lyrics 

Live rhythms arranged and performed by Krishna kishor & Team

Percussionists - 
K V Prasad 
Ganesh Rao 
Samual 
Rahul 
Recorded by Lijesh Kumar (Chennai) 

Carnatic Violin - Manas Kumar 
Ethnic Strokes - Tapas Roy 
Harmonium - Shibbu ji
AC Guitars and Bass - Shomu Seal 

Instruments Recorded at MidnightOwl Studios 

Chorus - Sudhanshu Shome and Team 

Boys 
Sudhanshu Shome 
Pankaj Dixit 
Mridul Ghosh

Girls 
Bhagyashree V Mhatre
Mayuri Kudalkar 
Pallavi roy

Recorded at Input One by Samir Dharap

Mixed and Mastered by Abhishek Ghatak


Creative Director - Piyush Thakur
DOP - Nanni Gill
Editor - Mayank Thapar 
Line Producer - Neeraj Bhatt ( Bhatt Production )
1st AD - Manik Thakur
Colourist - Aman Rajowal 
VFX - Gagan Matharoo 
Local LP - Arya Chaudhary
Choreographer - Sonu Arizona
Make up artist - Gill
Art Director - Rahul and Rohit
Creatives - Siddhesh Katkar

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

вЦЇ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. KripaвАЩs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

вЬЦ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

вЬЦ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

рЯО§  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–µ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–µin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
snippet.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytellingвАФleaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the trackвАФAsha BoroвАЩs soothing tone and Nikita BoroвАЩs expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity



AUDIO CREDITS
Singer- AASHA BORO & NIKITAA BORO
Lyrics and Tune- SWMKHWR DAIMARI
Music/Mix Mastered by- AMAR BORO
Flute- ANUPAL RABHA
Serja- KULEN BASUMATARY
Recorded by- Pinku Das at Red AV Studio


VIDEO CREDITS:

Direction & Choreography- LEE SHAAN RAMY
Asst. - ANJU BORO
Dop/ Post Production- BILIPHANG BARO
Asst. - GOPI BORO
Mua- MIJING ISLARY
Costume- DOKHONA ( SIKHIRI BRAND )
                  WHITE BEADED BLOUSE ( SAHELI HOUSE )

snippet.title: Veni Vidi Vici (Video Song) | MOTHER PROMISE | Daali Dhananjaya | Gurukiran | Poorna Mysore
snippet.description:
#ROASTSONG #VENIVIDIVICI #MotherPromise

INT. ROSSI ADDA - NIGHT
Setting: RCB Trophy Winning Night. 3rd June 2025
The victory is sweet, but the roasts are ruthless.
Watch the boys of Rossi Adda turn the night into an absolute madhouse. They are celebrating the win and unapologetically roasting anyone foolish enough to cross Rossi. No holding back - just pure ROASTING.
Presenting the explosive first single from the upcoming quirky gangster drama, "Mother Promise".
Enjoy the song. Enjoy the vibe. The dance floor is officially open, and the comment section is all yours - let us know your favorite roast from the track!

#ROASTSONG #VENIVIDIVICI #MotherPromise

INT. ROSSI ADDA - NIGHT
Setting: RCB Trophy Winning Night. 3rd June 2025
The victory is sweet, but the roasts are ruthless.
Watch the boys of Rossi Adda turn the night into an absolute madhouse. They are celebrating the win and unapologetically roasting anyone foolish enough to cross Rossi. No holding back - just pure ROASTING.
Presenting the explosive first single from the upcoming quirky gangster drama, "Mother Promise".
Enjoy the song. Enjoy the vibe. The dance floor is officially open, and the comment section is all yours - let us know your favorite roast from the track!

Listen to the powerful devotional songs of Kanaka Durga, worshipped at the sacred Kanaka Durga Temple. These Bezawada Durgamma songs are filled with devotion and spiritual energy, bringing peace, protection, and blessings to devotees.

This collection of Durga Devi folk devotional songs in Telugu reflects traditional village-style bhakti, praising the divine power of Ammavaru. Listening to these songs with faith is believed to remove obstacles, protect from negativity, and bless your home with prosperity and happiness.

snippet.title: Ranjha (Official Lyrical Video) - Noor Chahal | IndieA Records | Rtist 91
snippet.description:
Noor Chahal's "Ranjha" is more than an ode to love вАФ itвАЩs a womanвАЩs quiet rebellion. It reflects her longing to escape a world that celebrates her obedience but condemns her desires.

The song is a tender yet defiant plea to her Ranjha вАФ to carry her into a world free of judgment and rigid norms. 

A love so passionate, it blurs the line between lover & beloved вАФ she merges into her lover & becomes Ranjha herself. 

With quiet resilience & rebellion, Ranjha is a song about choosing love, freedom, and self вАФ even when the world wonвАЩt allow it.

Stream "Ranjha": https://umgi.lnk.to/Ranjha_NoorChahal

Credits:

Singer, Lyricist & Composer: Noor Chahal 
Music & Mix-Master: DEVM
Label: Indiea Records (UMG) 
Video, Production & Direction: Sunny Raj (Rtist 91) 
DOP: Kaisar Alam 
Fashion Photography: Ankit Mourya (Clickwala Photography)
Post Production: Plugin films
Editor: Mukul Maggo
Choreographers: Noor Chahal, Bhomik and Divya
Assistant Director & Art: Geetanjali Raj 
Project Head: Arushi Yadav
Line Production: Jassi, Arushi, Tavleen, Aditi Verma 
1st AC : Saurabh Rawat
Additional Art Consultant: Shreya Jain
Dancers: Deepti, Aastha, Palak & Manasvi
Stylist: Prabhjot 
Artwork: Sachin
Colourist: Rajat Katth 
VFX Team- Piyush Verma, Cinevera Studios, Anurag Taneja, Baljeet Virk, Shafquat Hussain
Artist Hair: Akash Ved Birla  
Dancers HMU: Himanshi Sharma



Lyrics: 

Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi
Iss Duniya Nu Main Na Jaana
Mera Ghar Na Koi 
Door Des Meinu Laija Ve
Mera Dil Nai Parhda Koi
Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha HoiвА¶

Duniya De Rang Rang Jaavan
Te Main Changi Kehlaavan
Dil Apne Di Kar Baithan
Te Main Khasma Nu Khaavan
Dum Humdum Mera Ghutda Jaave
Til Til Mardi Jaavan
Rooh Meri Nu Seene Laa
Tenu Ik Ik Dard Sunaavan

Ve Meinu Duniya Taane Maare
Ve Main Chhad Aavan Mahal Minaare
Ve Meinu Laija Takht Hazaare 
Jithe Ishq De Hon Nazaare

Ve Aakho Heer Heer Na Koi
Ve Main Ta Jogan Ohdi Hoi
Ni Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha HoiвА¶
